mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_count FROM teacher_audit ta LEFT JOIN paper_submit ps ON ta.submit_id = ps.id WHERE -- 教师ID筛选 ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId} -- 审核状态：待审核（假设状态值 0-待审核，1-已通过，2-已驳回） AND ta.audit_status = 0 -- 提交时间范围（按学生提交时间筛选） AND DATE(ps.submit_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- 软删除 AND ta.is_deleted = 0 AND ps.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, -- 已审核任务数 -- 总审核耗时（秒）：审核完成时间 - 审核分配时间 SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, ta.allocate_time, ta.audit_finish_time)) AS total_time FROM teacher_audit ta LEFT JOIN paper_submit ps ON ta.submit_id = ps.id WHERE ta.teacher_id = #{teacherId} -- 审核状态：已完成（1-通过或2-驳回） AND ta.audit_status IN (1, 2) -- 审核完成时间范围 AND DATE(ta.audit_finish_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ta.is_deleted = 0 AND ps.is_deleted = 0
